name: design-blueprint
description: 设计蓝图风格 - Figma 选择框、标注线、UI 文档美学
prompt_template: Design process documentation, Figma blueprint style, white background, cyan grid lines #66B8CC, selection boxes with control points, numbered labels, technical annotation style, UI/UX design mockup aesthetic, clean sans-serif typography, blurred content placeholders, --ar {aspect_ratio} --style raw --v 6
negative_prompt: photorealistic, decorative, vintage, grunge, shadows, gradients, artistic
